tasks.name: Analyze our project, what other features would be useful for us
tasks.fullName: Analyze our project, what other features would be useful for us

tasks.name: Editable task description
tasks.fullName: Editable task description in detail panel
tasks.description: Task description is set at creation and can never be changed. Make it editable in the detail panel, similar to how the task name is already editable inline.

tasks.name: Task search and filter
tasks.fullName: Task search and status filter on the task board
tasks.description: Add a text search field to filter tasks by name, plus status filter tabs (All / Pending / In Progress / Blocked) so the board stays manageable as it grows.

tasks.name: Task timeline and history
tasks.fullName: Task timeline with timestamps for creation, start, and completion
tasks.description: Add createdAt, startedAt, completedAt timestamps to tasks. Show a mini-timeline in the detail panel so the manager can see velocity and how long tasks take.

tasks.name: Blocked reason field
tasks.fullName: Add a blocked reason text field for blocked tasks
tasks.description: Tasks can be marked blocked but there's no way to say why. Add a 'blocked reason' text field that appears when status is blocked, visible in the card and detail panel.

tasks.name: Feature-task linking
tasks.fullName: Link tasks to features as epics
tasks.description: Features exist but aren't connected to tasks. Let the manager group tasks under a feature (epic) to get a higher-level view of progress per feature.

tasks.name: State backup and undo
tasks.fullName: Auto-snapshot state.json before destructive operations
tasks.description: No way to recover from accidental task deletes or bad edits. Auto-save a snapshot of state.json before destructive operations (delete, bulk changes) and provide a simple undo/restore mechanism.

tasks.name: Responsive layout
tasks.fullName: Responsive layout for narrow screens and mobile
tasks.description: The 2x2 grid layout doesn't work on narrow screens. Add a collapsible sidebar or tab-based layout for smaller viewports so Dev Manager is usable on tablets and smaller displays.

tasks.name: Extract shared constants
tasks.fullName: Extract shared constants: statuses, colors, hashString
tasks.description: Create src/constants/statuses.js, src/constants/colors.js (EPIC_PALETTE, status colors), src/utils/hash.js (hashString). Remove duplicates from TaskBoard, CommandQueue, TaskDetail.

tasks.name: CSS token system
tasks.fullName: CSS token system: variables.css with design tokens
tasks.description: Expand styles.css into variables.css. Extract all hardcoded hex (#9b8bb4, #6a8dbe, rgba...) into CSS variables. --dm-accent, --dm-amber, --dm-purple, --dm-success, etc. Replace inline color refs.

tasks.name: Extract App.jsx handlers
tasks.fullName: Extract App.jsx handlers into useTaskActions + useQueueActions hooks
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useTaskActions.js (add/update/delete/rename) and src/hooks/useQueueActions.js (queue/launch/clear). App.jsx from ~422 to ~200 lines.

tasks.name: Split TaskDetail
tasks.fullName: Split TaskDetail into Timeline, Attachments, Dependencies, EpicField
tasks.description: Extract src/components/detail/Timeline.jsx, Attachments.jsx, Dependencies.jsx, EpicField.jsx. TaskDetail from 608 to ~250 lines.

tasks.name: Split TaskBoard
tasks.fullName: Split TaskBoard into TaskCard, EpicGroup, DoneSection, StatusFilter
tasks.description: Extract src/components/board/TaskCard.jsx, EpicGroup.jsx, DoneSection.jsx, StatusFilter.jsx. TaskBoard from 505 to ~200 lines.

tasks.name: Split CommandQueue
tasks.fullName: Split CommandQueue into QueueItem, PhaseView subcomponents
tasks.description: Extract src/components/queue/QueueItem.jsx, PhaseView.jsx. CommandQueue from 413 to ~200 lines.

tasks.name: Add TypeScript
tasks.fullName: Add TypeScript: types, tsconfig, rename all files
tasks.description: Create src/types/index.ts (Task, QueueItem, Epic, Activity, ProgressEntry, StateData). Add tsconfig.json strict. Rename .jsx/.js to .tsx/.ts. Type all props and returns.

tasks.name: Inline styles to CSS
tasks.fullName: Migrate inline styles to CSS classes in components.css
tasks.description: Move repeated visual styles to .task-card, .queue-item, .badge-*, .epic-label, .timeline-dot classes. Keep layout inline, move colors/fonts/shadows to CSS. No hardcoded colors in JSX.

tasks.name: Error boundary + loading
tasks.fullName: Add error boundary, loading skeleton, graceful state.json handling
tasks.description: Error boundary wrapper. Loading skeleton for project connect. Handle corrupted/missing state.json gracefully.

tasks.name: Bridge server + headless launch
tasks.fullName: Replace File System Access API with Node.js bridge server and add headless AI execution
tasks.description: Phase 1+2 of product vision. Bridge server on localhost:4545 with REST API + WebSocket. Headless process spawning for Claude/Codex/Cursor. Cross-platform, any browser. Multi-project switching.

tasks.name: Output panel UI
tasks.fullName: Show live AI output in the board — render streamed process output
tasks.description: The bridge server already captures stdout/stderr from AI processes and streams it via WebSocket. Build a UI panel that shows this output live — so the manager can see what the AI is doing without opening a terminal. Expandable per-task output viewer in the queue or detail panel.

tasks.name: Project templates
tasks.fullName: Starter kits for game, web, and mobile projects with pre-configured skills and agents
tasks.description: Bundles per project type: game (game-designer, gameplay-programmer, qa-tester), web (senior-frontend, backend, databases, ui-ux), mobile (mobile-dev, ui-ux, backend). Each includes .claude/skills/, .claude/agents/, default epic-to-skill mappings, and optional scaffold command. Template picker on first project setup.

tasks.name: Engine selector UI
tasks.fullName: Let users pick their preferred AI engine per project — Claude, Codex, or Cursor
tasks.description: The bridge server already supports claude, codex, and cursor engine adapters. Add a UI setting (per project) to choose the default engine. Show engine icon on launch buttons. Allow per-task engine override in the detail panel.

tasks.name: npx devmanager
tasks.fullName: Publish to npm so users can run 'npx devmanager' to install and start
tasks.description: Package the bridge server + built UI for npm publish. Scope the package name (@devmanager/cli or devmanager). Add postinstall or first-run setup. One command: npx devmanager ./my-project — installs, builds, starts server, opens browser. Update README with quick start guide.

tasks.name: Static hosting support
tasks.fullName: Deploy UI to Vercel/Netlify with bridge server connection
tasks.description: Make the web UI deployable as a static site (Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages). The UI connects to a local bridge server via configurable URL. User runs bridge server locally, opens hosted UI, enters bridge URL. No need to clone the repo or run npm install for the UI part.

activity.label: State backup and undo marked done
State backup and undo marked done
